subject_information.address: 49331 Lewis Views Apt. 516, Lake Maryshire, DE 59549

suspicious_activity.narrative: Jacqueline Rodriguez (CUST_0111) exhibited suspicious activity indicative of money laundering. From February to July 2025, she conducted varied transactions across multiple accounts with high balances. Notably, on 2025-07-29, a wire transfer credit of $76,517.25 was received, followed by four large wire transfer debits totaling $49,517.51 within two days.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: The customer has a high risk rating and is conducting transactions through multiple accounts with high average monthly balances. The transactions are varied and include wire transfers, check deposits, and ACH debits, which could be an attempt to obscure the source of funds.
